summary: Comprehensive text contrast retest for LIGHT minimalist mode. Major CSS fixes validated - Inventory Valuation header/values now VISIBLE. However, discovered 2 REMAINING ISSUES: 1) Settings filter buttons have white text on 10% opacity colored backgrounds (invisible), 2) CONFIGURACIÓN header still invisible/faint.

issues: Filter buttons (Admin, Mesero, Cajero, Cocina) have white text on 10% opacity colored backgrounds - INVISIBLE
CSS rule [class*="bg-green-"] { color: white } matches bg-green-500/10 setting white text on light green bg
Same issue for bg-red-500/10, bg-blue-500/10, bg-orange-500/10
design_issues.css_classes_affected: text-red-500 on bg-red-500/10, text-blue-500 on bg-blue-500/10, text-green-500 on bg-green-500/10, text-orange-500 on bg-orange-500/10

issues: CONFIGURACIÓN header uses text-white class on transparent bg - becomes faint/invisible
Apariencia section header labels like 'Estilo de Tema', 'Personalizar Neumorfismo' are invisible

screens_tested.dashboard: PASS - all stat cards, values, section titles visible
screens_tested.tables_page: PASS - header, area tabs, legend, table numbers all visible
screens_tested.order_screen: PASS - Mesa header, item names, prices, Enviado badges, Subtotal/Total, FACTURAR visible
screens_tested.payment_screen: PASS - TOTAL value solid dark (not gradient), FORMAS DE PAGO visible, payment methods visible
screens_tested.cash_register: PASS - header, status, amounts, movements all visible
screens_tested.kitchen: PASS - COCINA header, order cards, items visible
screens_tested.sidebar: PASS - ALL nav labels (Panel, Mesas, Cocina, Caja, Reservas, Config) visible
screens_tested.inventory_valuation: PASS - Valorización de Inventario header visible in GREEN, RD$ 9,962.78 visible, 7 registros visible
screens_tested.settings_users: PARTIAL - tab names visible, user names visible, filter buttons INVISIBLE
screens_tested.settings_appearance: PARTIAL - Claro/Oscuro buttons visible, section headers INVISIBLE

action_items: HIGH: Fix filter buttons in UsersTab.js - buttons with bg-color-500/10 should have text-color-500 not white text
HIGH: Add CSS exception to theme-minimalist.css - exclude bg-*-500/10 (10% opacity backgrounds) from white text rule
HIGH: Fix CONFIGURACIÓN header in settings pages - needs dark foreground color in light mode
critical_code_review_comments: theme-minimalist.css lines 503-509: Rule [class*="bg-green-"] { color: white } incorrectly matches bg-green-500/10
The selector [class*="bg-green-"] matches both bg-green-500 (solid) AND bg-green-500/10 (10% opacity)
Need more specific selectors like [class*="bg-green-5"]:not([class*="/1"]) to exclude opacity variants
context_for_next_testing_agent: Minimalist Light mode mostly fixed. Remaining issues: 1) Filter buttons in Settings>Users have white text on 10% opacity backgrounds, 2) CONFIGURACIÓN header and some Apariencia section labels invisible. The CSS rule [class*="bg-green-"] { color: white } needs refinement to exclude opacity variants.

improvements_from_previous_iteration.inventory_valuation: FIXED - emerald-50/100 text now visible in dark green
improvements_from_previous_iteration.payment_total: FIXED - gradient text now solid dark foreground
improvements_from_previous_iteration.order_screen: CONFIRMED - all elements including Enviado badges visible
